我正在写论文，帮我把中文部分翻译为专业的学术英语，已经是英文的部分无需翻译：
  
\noindent \textbf{Experimental settings}. We conduct our experiments on both the T2I model Flux.1.0-dev with 30 sampling steps and the T2V model WAN 2.1-14B with 50 sampling steps. The reuse threshold $\sigma$ is set as xxx for Flux, and xxx for WAN, respectively. If not specified, experiments in this section are conducted on 8 NVIDIA H200 GPUs.
\noindent \textbf{Baselines}. We mainly compare the proposed FA-Cache with (i) the vanilla HiFlow framework (without cache), (ii) uniform caching with static caching intervals, as well as (iii) TeaCache [], a state-of-the-art caching method for DiTs.
\noindent \textbf{Evaluation}. 我们复用Section~\ref{sec:exp-fa-guidance}中所用数据集来进行评测

oindent 	extbf{Experimental settings}. We conduct our experiments on both the T2I model Flux.1.0-dev with 30 sampling steps and the T2V model WAN 2.1-14B with 50 sampling steps. The reuse threshold $\sigma$ is set as xxx for Flux, and xxx for WAN, respectively. If not specified, experiments in this section are conducted on 8 NVIDIA H200 GPUs.  

oindent 	extbf{Baselines}. We mainly compare the proposed FA-Cache with (i) the vanilla HiFlow framework (without cache), (ii) uniform caching with static caching intervals, as well as (iii) TeaCache [], a state-of-the-art caching method for DiTs.  

oindent 	extbf{Evaluation}. We reuse the dataset employed in Section~ef{sec:exp-fa-guidance} for evaluation.

考虑到时间成本，We primarily conduct ablation experiments on the T2I model Flux. HiFlow performs guided high-resolution generation by aligning its flow with the reference flow in three aspects: initialization ($A_i$), direction ($A_d$), and acceleration ($A_a$).
As can be observed in Fig.~\ref{fig:ablation}, initialization alignment helps avoid semantic incorrectness by facilitating low-frequency consistency with low-resolution images. Furthermore, direction alignment enhances structure preservation in the generation process by suppressing the updating in the low-frequency component. Moreover, acceleration alignment contributes to high-fidelity detail synthesizing, eliminating the production of repetitive patterns in the garden, as shown in the realistic woman's face and the appearance of her clothing. Quantitative results of the ablation study are shown in Tab.~\ref{tab:ablation}.

Considering the time cost, we primarily conduct ablation experiments on the T2I model Flux. HiFlow enables guided high-resolution generation by aligning its flow with the reference flow in three aspects: initialization ($A_i$), direction ($A_d$), and acceleration ($A_a$).  
As illustrated in Fig.~\ref{fig:ablation}, initialization alignment helps prevent semantic errors by promoting low-frequency consistency with the low-resolution images. Furthermore, direction alignment improves structural preservation during generation by suppressing updates in the low-frequency components. Moreover, acceleration alignment facilitates high-fidelity detail synthesis and mitigates repetitive artifacts in the background, as evidenced by the realistic rendering of the woman’s face and the appearance of her clothing. Quantitative ablation results are reported in Tab.~\ref{tab:ablation}.
\noindent \textbf{Qualitative Comparison}. As shown in Fig~\ref{fig:comparison-video}, HiFlow在high-resolution video generation上同样表现卓越
\noindent \textbf{Qualitative Comparison}. As shown in Fig.~\ref{fig:comparison-video}, HiFlow also demonstrates strong performance in high-resolution video generation.

\noindent \textbf{Qualitative Comparison}. As shown in Fig~\ref{fig:comparison-video}, HiFlow also demonstrates superior performance in high-resolution video generation. DiffuseHigh 和I-Max的表现类似于它们在image gerenation时的情况，即在高分辨率生成时出现模糊和低保真度细节

\noindent \textbf{Qualitative Comparison}. As shown in Fig.~\ref{fig:comparison-video}, HiFlow also demonstrates superior performance in high-resolution video generation. DiffuseHigh and I-Max exhibit behavior similar to that observed in image generation, producing blurry results and low-fidelity details at high resolutions.

As shown in Fig~\ref{fig:comparison-video}, HiFlow also demonstrates superior performance in high-resolution video generation. DiffuseHigh and I-Max exhibit behavior similar to that observed in image generation, producing blurry results and low-fidelity details at high resolutions. BSRGAN能够产生锐利的视频帧，但是它不能合成合理的细节

As shown in Fig.~\ref{fig:comparison-video}, HiFlow also demonstrates superior performance in high-resolution video generation. DiffuseHigh and I-Max exhibit behavior similar to that observed in image generation, producing blurry results and low-fidelity details at high resolutions. Although BSRGAN can produce sharp video frames, it fails to synthesize plausible details.
别用although

As shown in Fig.~\ref{fig:comparison-video}, HiFlow also demonstrates superior performance in high-resolution video generation. DiffuseHigh and I-Max exhibit behavior similar to that observed in image generation, producing blurry results and low-fidelity details at high resolutions. BSRGAN can produce sharp video frames; however, it fails to synthesize plausible details.

As shown in Fig~\ref{fig:comparison-video}, HiFlow also demonstrates superior performance in high-resolution video generation. DiffuseHigh and I-Max exhibit behavior similar to that observed in image generation, producing blurry results and low-fidelity details at high resolutions. While BSRGAN can produce sharp video frames, it fails to synthesize plausible details. Upscale-A-Video作为一个diffusion-based超分方法，能够一定程度上合成新细节，但是受限于自身的模型性能，难以合成finer details。

As shown in Fig.~\ref{fig:comparison-video}, HiFlow also demonstrates superior performance in high-resolution video generation. DiffuseHigh and I-Max exhibit behavior similar to that observed in image generation, producing blurry results and low-fidelity details at high resolutions. While BSRGAN can produce sharp video frames, it fails to synthesize plausible details. As a diffusion-based super-resolution method, Upscale-A-Video can synthesize new details to some extent; however, its model capacity limits its ability to generate finer details.

As shown in Fig~\ref{fig:comparison-video}, HiFlow also demonstrates superior performance in high-resolution video generation. DiffuseHigh and I-Max exhibit behavior similar to that observed in image generation, producing blurry results and low-fidelity details at high resolutions. While BSRGAN can produce sharp video frames, it fails to synthesize plausible details. As a diffusion-based super-resolution method, Upscale-A-Video can synthesize new details based on low-resolution inputs to some extent. However, the limited model capacity prevents it from generating finer details. In contrast, our HiFlow 能够在维持结构合理的前提下，稳定地合成新的高保真度细节

As shown in Fig.~\ref{fig:comparison-video}, HiFlow also demonstrates superior performance in high-resolution video generation. DiffuseHigh and I-Max exhibit behavior similar to that observed in image generation, producing blurry results and low-fidelity details at high resolutions. While BSRGAN can produce sharp video frames, it fails to synthesize plausible details. As a diffusion-based super-resolution method, Upscale-A-Video can synthesize new details based on low-resolution inputs to some extent. However, the limited model capacity prevents it from generating finer details. In contrast, our HiFlow can stably synthesize new high-fidelity details while preserving structurally coherent content.
\noindent \textbf{Quantitative Evaluation}. The quantitative results for WAN are presented in Tab~\ref{tab:quant-video}. 在两种测试分辨率下，HiFlow都能够持续超越baseline在VBench metrics上

\noindent \textbf{Quantitative Evaluation}. The quantitative results for WAN are presented in Tab.~\ref{tab:quant-video}. Across both test resolutions, HiFlow consistently outperforms the baselines on the VBench metrics.
\noindent \textbf{Quantitative Evaluation}. The quantitative results for WAN are presented in Tab~\ref{tab:quant-video}. 值得注意的是，HiFlow在两种测试分辨率下相较于baseline都展现出了卓越的性能。特别是在frame视觉quality上，展现出了显著的提升

\noindent \textbf{Quantitative Evaluation}. The quantitative results for WAN are presented in Tab.~\ref{tab:quant-video}. Notably, HiFlow achieves superior performance compared with the baselines at both test resolutions. In particular, it yields a pronounced improvement in frame-level visual quality.

The quantitative results for WAN are presented in Tab~\ref{tab:quant-video}. Notably, HiFlow achieves superior performance compared with the baselines at both test resolutions, measured by VBench metrics. 这进一步证实了HiFlow在高分辨率image和video生成上的通用性

The quantitative results for WAN are presented in Tab.~\ref{tab:quant-video}. Notably, HiFlow achieves superior performance compared with the baselines at both test resolutions, as measured by the VBench metrics. This further confirms the generality of HiFlow for high-resolution image and video generation.
